entities.name: vibe checks

entities.name: anti-pattern button
entities.context: A UI pattern where a single button flushes successive chunks of money when marginal candidates interact with it

entities.name: stronger guardrails
entities.context: Needed to prevent the economic waste demonstrated by the anti-pattern button
